assertions.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the teaching-session skill
Session start: Claude reads teacher/ files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
Lesson meta.yaml: Claude looks for multi-layer-networks/meta.yaml and checks its depends entries
Notebook in lesson dir: Session notebook is created inside the lesson directory, not in blackboard/
Socratic greet: Claude greets in persona voice (not as generic assistant)
Session end updates: Claude indicates it will update meta.yaml status, session_log.md, and knowledge_gaps.md at session end
